message:
test(transport): add audit regression tests for multipath aggregator

Add comprehensive audit tests covering edge cases and invariants in the
multipath transport aggregator subsystem (flush scheduling, dedup,
reordering, path management, and error types).

Tests added:
- flush_respects_interval_gating: verify flush() returns empty when
  called before the configured flush_interval elapses, and returns
  buffered symbols after the interval passes (plus max_wait_time)
- dedup_prune_removes_expired_objects: verify SymbolDeduplicator::prune
  respects entry_ttl — keeps entries within TTL, removes those past it,
  and updates objects_tracked stats correctly
- reorderer_late_duplicate_ignored: verify SymbolReorderer silently
  discards late duplicate symbols (same object_id + ESI) that arrive
  after the sequence has already advanced past that position
- path_set_round_robin_cycles: verify RoundRobin policy selects one
  path per call and cycles through all registered paths over multiple
  invocations
- path_set_remove_path: verify PathSet::remove returns the path on
  first call, None on double-remove, and correctly decrements count
- aggregation_error_display_variants: verify Display implementations
  for PathNotFound, PathUnavailable, and InvalidSequence error variants
  include relevant identifiers and expected/received values

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
